title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Pair headset with charge case
scenario: Voyager Legend 50 headset and charge case battery levels and Cloud website device details display correctly after power cycle and reconnection to Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log into your account.
2. Ensure a Poly Voyager Legend 50 (Flamingo) headset is paired with the app via Bluetooth.
3. On the Home screen, verify the headset is connected and displayed.
4. Turn the headset off by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED turns off.
5. Place the headset into the charge case and close the case lid.
8. Remove the headset from the charge case.
9. Turn the headset on by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED turns on.
10. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen for battery level indicators for both the headset and the charge case.
11. Log into the Poly Cloud website (cloud.poly.com) using the same account credentials.
12. Navigate to the Devices section and locate the paired device entry.
13. Verify the device is listed as "Voyager Legend 50 UC".
14. Click on the device name to open the device details page.

15. On the details page, verify the following: earpiece and charge case information are displayed, an image showing both the earpiece and charge case is present, and a Component section lists separate entries for the earpiece and charge case.
expected: Headset turns on successfully. Poly Studio Mobile app displays battery levels for both the headset and the charge case. On the Poly Cloud website, the device is displayed as "Voyager Legend 50 UC". Clicking the device opens a details page showing earpiece and charge case info, an image of both components, and a Component section with separate entries for the earpiece and charge case.
